name: Deep Binary Analysis (Symbolic Execution)
description: Symbolically executes a compiled binary (angr) to solve for inputs that reach a target/dangerous state and to detect memory-corruption bugs where attacker input controls the instruction pointer.
author: NisargHunter AI core

reach.description: symbol or 0xADDR to solve an input for

permissions.reason: Loads the binary for symbolic analysis; it is not executed natively.
Symbolic execution is CPU/RAM intensive and time-bounded per run.
